login.title: Log In
login.subtitle: Access your trades, documents, and compliance data
login.registeredSuccess: Account created successfully! Please log in.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Save your compliance checks and trade data securely
register.dataRegionInfo: Your data will be stored in: {{region}}

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
forgotPassword.resentMessage: Reset link resent! Please check your inbox (and spam folder).
forgotPassword.sentMessage: If an account with that email exists, we've sent a password reset link. Please check your inbox.
forgotPassword.errorDefault: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account
resetPassword.invalidLinkMessage: This password reset link is invalid. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset successfully.
